{{Quote|What happened to Telfrey was worst, though... The Telfreyans rebelled outright... they were a proud people... it will be many generations before the surface of Telfrey will again support life.|Primor tells [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] about the fate of the Telfreyans|<ref name="SW74" />}}
The '''Telfreyans''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Telfrey]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] they shared with [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. They were [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with small patches of green hair at the top of their heads. Due to their proud nature they rebelled against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] when it became active in the [[Iskalon system/Legends|Iskalon system]] where they lived. The Empire responded quickly to this unrest due to the actions of two Human [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] from Telfrey, [[Yom Argo]] and [[Tay Vanis]], who were spreading unrest throughout the system.<ref name="SW74" /> A [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|Base Delta Zero]]<ref name="IS">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> attack was used on Telfrey, which killed all life there and rendered it uninhabitable for many [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="SW74" />

==Behind the scenes==
Telfreyans first appeared in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] comic [[Star Wars (1977) 74|''Star Wars'' (1977) 74]], published in [[1983]], in which they were shown in a flashback detailing the destruction of [[Telfrey]].
